title: Telephone Hill Survey
summary: CBJ wants your input on future development of the Telephone Hill neighborhood. Juneau residents are invited to take a quick online survey about development scenarios on Telephone Hill for a chance to win a $200 Fred Meyers gift card. The survey will be open through January 9. summary: The Nome Arts Council, Katirvik Cultural Center, and National Park Service are excited to announce the return of the Alappaa Film Festival, featuring films from the far north! title: China and the Arctic in 2023: Final Remarks
summary: The Arctic Institute’s 2023 series about China and the Arctic has explored Beijing’s positions in and on the Far North. The post China and the Arctic in 2023: Final Remarks appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
